text_block_list.text: No... It's just been hard falling asleep<n>lately.
choice_data_list: Are you okay?! Don't overwork yourself!
Are you okay?! Don't overwork yourself!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Geez, no need to freak out! And quit<n>babying me.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
It happens a lot, anyway. Either I'm<n>not feeling so
hot or I'm pissed off<n>about something and can't
sleep.

...Ugh, why are we even talking about<n>this? Talk
about kicking me while I'm<n>already down.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin seems deprived of<n>sleep... I should
go easy on her.
